import CedarMicro.Ty

open CedarMicro

def varIndices (Γ : List Ty) (τ : Ty) : List Nat :=
  let rec loop (i : Nat) (rest : List Ty) (acc : List Nat) : List Nat :=
    match rest with
    | [] => acc.reverse
    | t :: ts => loop (i + 1) ts (if t == τ then
